subject: docs(claude): add Claude Code mobile/web note for sibling repo access
body:
Add AI Note covering how to access other devmade-ai repos from Claude Code
mobile and web sessions: use GITHUB_ALL_REPO_TOKEN with the GitHub API,
use $(printenv ...) to avoid shell expansion issues, and never clone sibling repos.

Tags: documentation, ai-notes, claude-code
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Xay7nsmuMKesTKzgV2zNFL
title: add Claude Code mobile/web note for sibling repo access
